## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run format:check` is green
- [ ] `src/_REPORT.md` shows 0 broken components
- [ ] If bindings changed: diff reviewed against upstream `@juspay/blend-design-system`
- [ ] Version = Blend version (1:1); use a `-N` suffix only for a binding-only re-release
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added if user-facing
